title: Museum Gallery Tour — Fewest Multiplications for the Visitor Interaction Tensor
strategies: mode-3 fiber decomposition: one term per (visitor,artwork) cell, R = I*J (trivial baseline, ratio ~0.1)
single-mode slice factorization: exactly factor each mode-1 slice, R = sum of slice ranks (greedy)
best-of-three-modes slice factorization: shop the slicing axis for the fewest terms (strong)
true low-rank / overcomplete decomposition below every slice bound (open; planted rank > max dimension so Jennrich fails)
